'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 10''' was the 10th issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]'', covering [[October]] and [[November]] [[1997]] and containing 66 pages.

==Contents==
===Departments===
*"[[The Sorcerer's Apprentice]]" {{C|by [[Ian Spelling]]}}
*:<small>[[Mark Hamill]] shares his opinions of the [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition]].</small>
*"[[Servants of the Dark Side]]" {{C|by [[Iain Lowson]]}}
*:<small>The concluding installment of our study into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces concentrates on the Empire's military machinery.</small>
*[[Anthony Daniels' Set Diary]]: Rising Cramp
*:<small>[[Anthony Daniels]] presents a rough guide to [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], and recommends a very reasonable hostelry.</small>
*"[[The Making of Star Wars (feature)|The Making of ''Star Wars'']]: Feeling the Force" {{C|by [[Dan Abnett]]}}
*:<small>Our production history comes to an end with the release, and marketing, of the original [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|Star Wars]].</small>
*"[[Still Life]]" {{C|by [[Marcus Hearn]]}}
*:<small>[[John Jay]], the official Star Wars photographer, recalls the assignment and talks about some of his favourite pictures.</small>
*[[George Lucas]] on ''Star Wars'' Episode I
*:<small>Highlights from a recent Italian press conference, during which George Lucas revealed many of his plans for the new Star Wars film.</small>
*"[[An Insider interview with Phil Tippett|Motion Control]]" {{C|from [[Star Wars Insider 33|''Star Wars Insider'' 33]]}}
*[[X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter Players Guide|''X-Wing vs TIE Fighter'' Players Guide]] {{C|by [[Brian Boyle]]}}
*:<small>Hints and tips to [[LucasArts]]' latest game, by the author of the official guide book.</small>
*"[[Shadow Stalker]]" Part 4
*:<small>[[Wrenga Jixton|Jix]] determines to continue the search for the real [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Lexhannen Torlock|Torlock]], but [[Droon]] places some unexpected obstacles in his path.</small>

===Features===
*[[Feel the Force]]
*[[Star Wars Q&A|Q&A]]
*[[Second Trooper]]: [[Declan Mulholland|The Man Behind the Hutt]] {{C|by [[Dave Bassom|David Bassom]]}}
*[[Jawa's Corner|Jawas' Corner]]
*Readers' Survey
